data.title: Skandia GreenPower to Launch Consolidated Invoicing to Boost Competitiveness
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Skandia GreenPower AS ( (DE:0RQ) ) has issued an update.

Skandia GreenPower AS is introducing consolidated invoicing across several or all of its brands in the largest grid areas, combining electricity charges, grid tariffs and any applicable electricity support on a single bill. The move is designed to simplify billing for customers and streamline the company’s service offering.

The company expects the new invoicing model to boost competitiveness by driving new sales, enhancing customer satisfaction and reducing churn, while also lowering credit risk when power prices are high since electricity support settlements will be paid directly to the group. Implementation will begin as soon as practical in 2026, with related costs already reflected in the company’s financial guidance for the year.

More about Skandia GreenPower AS

Skandia GreenPower AS is a Norwegian electricity supplier focused on retail power sales across multiple brands and major grid areas. The company operates in the energy sector, offering bundled electricity products and related tariff services to households and businesses, with an emphasis on customer retention and competitive positioning in the Nordic power market.

Average Trading Volume: 24,363

Current Market Cap: NOK213.5M

data.title: Northern 2 VCT Expands Share Capital with New London Listing
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Northern 2 VCT ( (GB:NTV) ) has provided an announcement.

Northern 2 VCT PLC has admitted 17,238,349 new ordinary shares of 5p each to trading on the London Stock Exchange Main Market, following an earlier equity issue under its offer for subscription. This increases the total number of ordinary shares in issue to 269,386,546, with the new shares fully fungible with existing stock, expanding the company’s capital base and potentially broadening its investor participation.

The admission, effective 8 April 2026, follows the prospectus published in September 2025 and subsequent supplementary prospectuses in December 2025. The enlarged share capital supports Northern 2 VCT’s ability to deploy additional funds into its venture capital portfolio, which may influence future investment capacity and returns for shareholders.

More about Northern 2 VCT

Northern 2 VCT PLC is a UK-listed venture capital trust investing in a diversified portfolio of smaller, growth-focused companies. Its ordinary shares trade on the London Stock Exchange Main Market, offering investors exposure to early-stage and developing businesses under the UK VCT regime.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.description:

The latest announcement is out from Saint Bella Inc. ( (HK:2508) ).

Saint Bella Group Limited has disclosed that, under its Saint Bella 2025 Share Award Scheme, a trustee purchased 800,000 shares on the market on 8 April 2026 at an average price of about HK$4.15 per share, for a total of roughly HK$3.32 million. Including this transaction, the trustee has accumulated 2,049,000 shares at a total cost of about HK$8.50 million, reflecting the company’s continued use of equity awards to incentivize stakeholders and potentially align management and employee interests with shareholder value.

The company indicated that the trustee will continue to buy shares from time to time in accordance with applicable laws and regulations, signalling an ongoing commitment to the share award mechanism as part of its broader compensation strategy. While the announcement advises shareholders and potential investors to exercise caution when dealing in the shares, the accumulated purchases under the scheme underscore a steady deployment of capital into share-based incentives that could influence market perception and liquidity over time.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2508) stock is a Buy with a HK$9.80 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Saint Bella Inc. stock, see the HK:2508 Stock Forecast page.

More about Saint Bella Inc.

Saint Bella Group Limited is a Cayman Islands–incorporated company listed in Hong Kong, operating through a group structure referred to as the Saint Bella Group. The company has implemented an equity-based Saint Bella 2025 Share Award Scheme, under which shares are acquired on-market by a trustee for future allocation to eligible participants as part of its remuneration and incentive arrangements.

data.title: Volaris Posts Higher March Load Factor as International Traffic Outpaces Domestic Demand
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Controladora Vuela Compania de Aviacion SAB de CV ( (VLRS) ) is now available.

On April 8, 2026, Volaris reported its preliminary traffic figures for March 2026, highlighting a consolidated load factor of 84.7%, up 0.3 percentage points year-on-year, as it carried 2.7 million passengers. Overall capacity measured in available seat miles rose 1.5% and traffic in revenue passenger miles grew 1.9%, with domestic RPMs falling 3.9% and international RPMs climbing 11.5%, underscoring a continued shift toward stronger international demand and a solid performance through the shoulder season leading into Semana Santa and spring break.

Management said demand this spring remains robust in both domestic and international markets but flagged higher jet fuel prices as a headwind and signaled it would respond with targeted capacity adjustments and gradual fare and ancillary increases as needed. The data show domestic capacity and traffic contracting while international operations expand at double-digit rates, suggesting an ongoing rebalancing of Volaris’ network that could influence its revenue mix, cost structure and competitive positioning in cross-border markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (VLRS) stock is a Hold with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Controladora Vuela Compania de Aviacion SAB de CV stock, see the VLRS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VLRS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VLRS is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial quality (TTM losses, deteriorating free cash flow, and very high leverage with a thin equity buffer). Technicals also remain bearish with the stock below key moving averages and negative MACD. Offsetting these, the latest earnings call provided improving 2026 guidance and a clearer operational recovery path (AOG reduction and targeted deleveraging), but execution and maintenance/CapEx risks remain high.

To see Spark’s full report on VLRS stock, click here.

More about Controladora Vuela Compania de Aviacion SAB de CV

Controladora Vuela Compañía de Aviación, S.A.B. de C.V., which operates as Volaris, is an ultra-low-cost carrier with point-to-point operations across Mexico, the United States, Central and South America. The airline focuses on low base fares for visiting-friends-and-relatives passengers and cost-conscious business and leisure travelers, operating one of Mexico’s youngest fleets on roughly 500 daily segments linking 46 Mexican cities with 30 international destinations.

Average Trading Volume: 841,866

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $807.7M

data.title: Navient Announces New CEO to Lead Transformation Phase
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Navient ( (NAVI) ) has provided an update.

Navient announced on April 8, 2026, that board chair Edward Bramson will become president and chief executive officer on June 5, 2026, succeeding David Yowan, who will step down from the executive role but remain on the board. Bramson, a veteran turnaround investor and partner at Sherborne Investors, will also continue as board chair, with director Larry Klane taking the role of lead independent director.

The leadership change follows what the company describes as the successful completion of Phase 1 of its transformation, which under Yowan included outsourcing loan servicing, divesting the business processing division and reducing corporate overheads to create a more focused and flexible firm. Navient plans for Bramson to lead Phase 2 of its strategic overhaul, signaling a continued emphasis on capital, cost and corporate restructuring to enhance shareholder value, while long-serving director Jane Thompson will retire from the board after the June 4, 2026 annual meeting and the board will be reduced to six members.

The most recent analyst rating on (NAVI) stock is a Sell with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Navient stock, see the NAVI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NAVI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NAVI is a Neutral.

The score is held back mainly by weak financial quality (2025 net loss and very high leverage) and bearish technicals (below major moving averages with negative momentum). These are partially offset by supportive income characteristics (high dividend yield) and a more optimistic 2026 outlook from management focused on expense cuts and origination growth, though legacy credit provisioning remains a meaningful risk.

To see Spark’s full report on NAVI stock, click here.

More about Navient

Navient (Nasdaq: NAVI) operates in the education finance sector, providing responsible lending, flexible refinancing solutions, servicing oversight and portfolio management focused on student and education-related loans. Through its Earnest digital financial services business, Navient targets customers seeking to achieve financial success via technology-driven borrowing and refinancing tools.

Wedgemount Resources ( (TSE:WDGY) ) has shared an update.

Wedgemount Resources has retained Machai Capital Inc. for a three-month engagement to lead its marketing, advertising and public awareness efforts, including multi-platform digital campaigns, social media amplification and targeted investor communications. The C$300,000 mandate, funded from general working capital, aims to enhance the company’s capital markets profile through search optimization, lead generation and broader digital outreach.

As part of the arrangement, Wedgemount has granted Machai 900,000 stock options exercisable at $0.07 per share for three years, with a four-month hold period on any resulting shares, alongside an additional 1,550,000 options issued to consultants on the same terms. The option grants, which are subject to Canadian Securities Exchange acceptance and staged vesting, further align external partners with the company’s long-term performance while potentially increasing its fully diluted share count.

data.title: Analogue Holdings Trims Stake in Nanjing Canatal in RMB61.5 Million Disposal
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Analogue Holdings Limited ( (HK:1977) ) has provided an update.

Analogue Holdings Limited has sold 6,336,500 A shares in Nanjing Canatal, representing about 1.17% of the latter’s issued share capital, through open market bidding and block trades between 25 March and 8 April 2026. The disposal generated approximately RMB61.5 million in cash proceeds and reduced Analogue’s stake in the Shanghai-listed precision environmental control specialist from around 15.70% to 14.53%, qualifying as a discloseable but shareholder-approval-exempt transaction under Hong Kong listing rules.

By monetising part of its investment at prevailing market prices while retaining a sizeable minority holding in Nanjing Canatal, Analogue has unlocked liquidity without materially exiting its exposure to the data centre environmental control sector. The move may provide additional financial flexibility for the group’s core E&M and ICT operations, while signalling active portfolio management of its strategic investments in related technology and infrastructure businesses.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1977) stock is a Hold with a HK$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Analogue Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:1977 Stock Forecast page.

More about Analogue Holdings Limited

Analogue Holdings Limited is a Bermuda-incorporated investment holding company and a leading provider of electrical and mechanical engineering solutions and information and communications technology services for smart cities. Headquartered in Hong Kong with operations across the Chinese mainland, Macau, the United States, the United Kingdom, Germany, Singapore and Malaysia, it serves public and private sector clients in building services, environmental engineering, information, communications and building technologies, and lifts and escalators.

data.title: Capita Updates Market on Enlarged Share Capital and Voting Rights
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Capita plc ( (GB:CPI) ) is now available.

Capita plc has confirmed that 800,000 new ordinary shares of 31 pence each have been admitted to trading on the London Stock Exchange, with dealings commencing at 8:00 a.m. on 8 April 2026. Following this admission, the company’s issued share capital now stands at 120,830,667 ordinary shares, all carrying voting rights and with none held in treasury.

The total number of voting rights in Capita is therefore 120,830,667, a figure that shareholders must use as the denominator when assessing whether they need to disclose holdings or changes in their interest under the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules. The update clarifies Capita’s capital structure and ensures investors have an accurate basis for regulatory reporting and monitoring of their ownership positions.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:CPI) stock is a Buy with a £450.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Capita plc stock, see the GB:CPI Stock Forecast page.

International Entertainment Corporation ( (HK:1009) ) has provided an announcement.

International Entertainment Corporation has completed a significant balance sheet cleanup by fully repaying and redeeming all outstanding promissory notes and settling its secured bank borrowing. The repayments were funded from the net proceeds of an earlier convertible notes subscription, which had been earmarked for these liabilities, and the move is expected to improve the group’s leverage profile and financial flexibility for shareholders and potential investors.

The board highlighted that these repayments align with previously disclosed plans to use part of the subscription proceeds for promissory note and bank debt reduction. With these obligations cleared, the company reduces its financing risk and interest burden, potentially strengthening its position in future capital markets dealings and enhancing its overall financial resilience.

data.title: REC Silicon Raises NOK 972.6 Million in Deeply Underwritten Rights Issue
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from REC Silicon ASA ( (RNWEF) ).

REC Silicon ASA has completed the allocation in its fully underwritten rights issue of 4,078,000,000 new shares at NOK 0.2385 per share, raising gross proceeds of NOK 972.6 million. Existing shareholders other than Anchor AS subscribed for 150,230,856 shares, while the remaining 3,927,769,144 shares, along with 113,000,457 underwriting commission shares, will be taken up by Anchor AS, significantly increasing the underwriter’s ownership stake.

The capital increase is expected to be registered and the new shares admitted to trading on Euronext Oslo Børs around 14 April 2026, subject to timely payment by investors. The transaction shores up REC Silicon’s balance sheet and secures funding under challenging subscription demand, but it also brings substantial dilution for existing shareholders and concentrates ownership further with the underwriting investor.

More about REC Silicon ASA

REC Silicon ASA is a Norway-based producer of advanced silicon materials, supplying high‑purity silicon gases to the global solar and electronics industries. Leveraging more than four decades of experience and proprietary technology, the company focuses on enabling high‑efficiency solar cells and semiconductor applications, and its shares are listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker RECSI.

Average Trading Volume: 1,484,662

Current Market Cap: NOK1.2B
